title: Delex Pull along Kids Wagon Wheelbarrow and Gardening, Beach and Tools Play Set With Water Pail and Spray Includes 10 Accessories and 4 Plant Pots
features: GREAT KIDS GARDEN TOOLS - This 16-piece gardening tools playset will help your kid become a pro gardener. These garden tools are perfectly-sized for their hands to get your garden growing

PERFECT BEACH TOY - We designed these toy tools set with versatility and practicality in mind. You can take these tools when you’re heading to a long holiday beach and build sand castles, towers, exciting figures of animals and more
SET INCLUDES - ✔ 8 gardening tools (3 large and 5 small) ✔ 4 flower pots ✔ water pail ✔ water spray bottle and ✔ wagon (measures 14” x 12” x 7”. The handle of the wagon extends up to 13”
SAFE & FUN - This durable toy is mommy approved and there are no BPA’s or other harmful chemicals that can affect your child. CPSC and ASTM Tested and Certified. 100% Safe for children to play.
EXCELLENT GIFT IDEA - You can buy these toy garden tools as a gift for your children. Surprise your little one with these colorful wagon set in his birthday, Christmas gift and more
description: Product Description Perfect Kids Outdoor Play Fun Offer your little angels this mind-blowing wagon garden kit and .Take them away from addictive gadgets .Fan their interest in nature spend constructive hours together .Help them socialize digging and planting with their friends .Teach them patience and creative play .Keep them busy playing in the yard, on the beach, on holiday gardening tool set that will thrill kids!at Dimple we know kids. We bet your toddler follows you in your gardening tasks, eager to join your efforts to make your plants flourish!this is why we are offering them a top quality wagon garden kit, smartly designed to make a handy, easy to use and absolutely safe garden tool kit of 8 gardening tools + 4 pots + 1 water pail + 1 spray bottle in a garden wagon toy- all they need to play creatively outdoors!a multipurpose learning toy take your Wagon garden tools everywhere! Let this versatile play set make your buddy on your walks to The playground, On the weekend trip Package Includes: ✔ 1x Wheelbarrow ✔ 1x Toy Leaf rake ✔ 1x Toy Flat rake ✔ 1x Toy Pick hoe ✔ 1x Toy Hand pruners and trowel ✔ 1x Toy Sprayer ✔ 1x Toy Watering can ✔ 1x Toy Hand rake ✔ 2x Toy Hand cultivators ✔ 4x Toy Plant pots Measurements: ✔ Wheelbarrow: 35 x 17 x 35cm ✔ Larger tools (e.g. leaf rake, pick hoe & flat rake): approx. 40cm ✔ Please note; sizing of accessories will vary depending on the item. Backyard Toys When it’s warm, kids would love planting and watching plants grow in his/her backyard. These kids gardening toys are ideal if you want your little one to learn about nature, the cycle of plant growth, and versatile plant species. Even if it’s winter, they can grow some plants in the house with pots included in this playset. Playtime on the Beach Kids can play with these outdoor toys on the beach, in the sandbox/sandpit. This outdoor playground equipment allows for quality family time. Little Toy Wagon The pull wagon allows for amplestorage space for a variety of garden tools, so kids can grab the handle and pull thingsanywhere they go for their next adventure. Strong and Durable Our premium quality toys are built to last! They're made with superior quality materials and are rigorously built for quality, leading to a toy unmatched in quality and durability. It's sure to withstand all the banging and clanging kids will love to put it through. Safe and Fun From the initial toy concept to the final product for sale at retail, safety is built into every toy. When it comes to the toys in our children's hands, what could possibly be more important than safety? Choose only the best for your child! Our Commitment We are fully dedicated to providing you with the best in fun, innovative toys. Our passion is to help families have fun and build great memories through play. We are committed to producing and selling high-quality products for optimum satisfaction. Why Play with Gadening tools Creativity + Role Play Pretend play gets kids engaged in storytelling as they act out new scenarios and communicate what imaginary things are going on – a great way to flex creativity and language skills! Physical + Motor Skills Play kitchens present kids with so many ways to practice their motor skills, like grasping and using small accessories and utensils, opening and closing doors, and turning oven knobs. Language + Social Skills Role playing requires kids to engage in storytelling as they make up scenarios and communicate with others about what role they’re playing. They also have to react and build off of what the other person said or did. Critical Thinking Running into problems while playing, like trouble closing the refrigerator door when too many items are placed inside or trying to swivel the faucet over a full sink, allow children to think through problems and craft solutions.
